title: Burning Topic Continuity Model

continuity_frames.purpose: Define the topic, why it matters now, what is known, and what is not yet established.
Trace the relevant background, chronology and institutional/public context.
Explain institutions, groups, technologies, policies, markets or social forces involved.
Separate verified facts, credible reporting, official records, expert interpretation and open questions.
Explain impact on citizens, systems, economy, environment, governance, culture or everyday life.
Compare with another country, sector, historical case, policy model or institutional response.
Record disputed claims, misinformation risks, unknowns, limitations and editorial cautions.
Describe possible future pathways without pretending prediction certainty.
Explain who can act, what mechanisms exist, and what accountability questions matter.
Connect the issue to human consequences, values, equity, trust and social meaning.
Help the reader consolidate the moving issue and understand what to watch next.
Close, extend, archive or convert the topic into a future deep-read/learning series candidate.

live_update_rule: No live feed, scraping or API-driven update is allowed in AG24E. Any future update must pass manual source verification and editorial review.
